title: Referral invitation template samples
description: Ready-to-use invitation templates the InvitationDispatcher can render. Each template supports the substitutions {sender_name}, {sender_display_name}, {referral_url}, {reward_summary}, {tenant_name}, {tenant_url}, {sender_avatar_url}, {unsubscribe_url}. All templates carry CAN-SPAM-compliant unsubscribe path + physical address footer.

templates.description: Neutral tone. Suitable for most tenants + most audiences. Default choice.
templates.subject: {sender_display_name} invited you to {tenant_name}
templates.body_html_hint: Standard two-column layout with tenant logo top-left, CTA button linking to {referral_url}, footer with unsubscribe + legal address.

templates.description: Playful tone with emoji. Suitable for consumer-fitness / youth-sports tenants.
templates.subject: hey — {sender_display_name} wants you at {tenant_name}
templates.body_html_hint: Minimal, informal — no fancy layout. Sender avatar prominent, CTA is inline text link.

templates.description: Formal tone. Suitable for B2B tenants + academic-style academies.
templates.subject: Invitation: {sender_display_name} recommends {tenant_name}
templates.body_html_hint: Formal serif typography, clean layout, subdued colours. Signature block with {sender_display_name}'s title if available.

templates.description: Family-oriented tone. Suitable for youth-sports + kids-academy tenants where the referrer is a parent inviting another parent.
templates.subject: {sender_display_name} thinks your kid would love {tenant_name}
templates.body_html_hint: Warm colours, family-focused imagery. CTA button emphasised. Include a testimonial quote if available.

templates.description: 160-char SMS template. Automatic fallback when channel=sms.
templates.body_plain: {sender_display_name} invited you to {tenant_name}. Get {reward_summary} when you join: {referral_url_short}. Reply STOP to unsubscribe.
notes: {referral_url_short} is auto-generated via the URL shortener (max 20 chars).
Fits in 160 chars for the average payload.
STOP compliance is CAN-SPAM + telecom carrier requirement.

substitutions.sender_name: The sender's full legal name (e.g. 'Alice Johnson').
substitutions.sender_display_name: The sender's display / preferred name (e.g. 'Alice' or 'Alice J.').
substitutions.sender_avatar_url: URL to the sender's avatar image (nullable).
substitutions.referral_url_short: Shortened URL for SMS (bit.ly-style; max 20 chars).
substitutions.reward_summary: Human-readable reward summary (e.g. '10% off your first payment' or '$25 in credits').
substitutions.tenant_tagline: The tenant's marketing tagline (from tenant settings).
substitutions.tenant_legal_address: The tenant's registered business address (required by CAN-SPAM Act).
substitutions.unsubscribe_url: Full URL to the recipient's per-email suppression endpoint.

notes: Every email template MUST carry: an unsubscribe link, the tenant's physical postal address, a non-misleading subject.
Tenants can customise templates via the settings module. Customisation is validated by the InvitationDispatcher's template linter to ensure CAN-SPAM compliance remains.
The default_template_slug config value (referrals.invitation.default_template_slug) picks which template runs when the caller doesn't specify one.
New templates added here require corresponding SDUI selector options in the invitation composer widget.
